answer:
Sure! Let me tell you about my friend Jake, who’s honestly just one of the most generous people I know. He's always the first to lend a hand when someone needs it, whether it’s helping a neighbor move furniture or just listening to a friend who's having a rough day. Jake volunteers at our local food bank every weekend, and he even organizes drives at his workplace to collect clothes and supplies for families in need.

From what I’ve seen, people really admire him. Everybody knows he doesn’t help others just for the sake of recognition—he genuinely cares. You can see it in the way he talks to people; he listens carefully and makes you feel like your problems matter. Folks around here often say he’s the kind of guy you'd want on your team, not just because he works hard, but because he lifts everyone’s spirits. It's kind of contagious, you know? His positive energy just brightens people’s days, and I think that’s why the community holds him in such high regard. All in all, Jake’s kindness sets an example, and it inspires others to chip in and help out as well.
title:
Discuss someone you know who helps others.
What kind of things does this person usually do to help others?
How do people feel about this person and why?
extData:
{"answerTemplate":"
"I would like to talk about [name or relation, e.g., 'my friend Sarah' or 'my uncle'] who is well-known for always helping others."
"[He/She] is [describe their personality traits, e.g., 'a very kind and generous person'] who always tries to make a difference in other people's lives."
"Usually, [he/she] helps others by [actions, such as volunteering at shelters, tutoring children, listening to others’ problems, or donating to charity]."  
Give a specific example:  
"For example, [he/she] recently [describe a specific helpful action, e.g., 'organized a fundraiser for local families in need' or 'spent weekends teaching elderly people how to use smartphones']."
"People generally feel [adjective, such as grateful, inspired, appreciative] towards [him/her]."  
Explain why:  
"This is because [he/she] always [reason, e.g., 'goes out of his/her way to assist others without expecting anything in return' or 'brings positivity to everyone around him/her']."
"More people like [him/her] would certainly make the world a warmer place."","titleTranslate":"谈谈你认识的一个帮助别人的人。
这个人通常会做哪些事情来帮助别人？
人们对这个人有什么感受，为什么？","pronuncFile":"/20260301/2b98e4b66614441d8c81c35ad3b53ca6.mp3"}
